news.title: Unreal Engine's big new idea is letting gen-AI LLMs plug directly into it and talk to it
news.titleEN: Unreal Engine's big new idea is letting gen-AI LLMs plug directly into it and talk to it
news.desc: Epic Games has revealed a new tool for Unreal Engine 5.8 which allows generative AI large language models (LLMs) to plug into and communicate with the engine directly, using its tools while being directed by text prompts. Read more
news.descEN: Epic Games has revealed a new tool for Unreal Engine 5.8 which allows generative AI large language models (LLMs) to plug into and communicate with the engine directly, using its tools while being directed by text prompts. Read more

news.title: "Rockstar thought they could control the narrative. They're wrong" - tribunal rules against GTA 6 developer's request to remove union's blacklisting claims from ongoing legal dispute
news.titleEN: "Rockstar thought they could control the narrative. They're wrong" - tribunal rules against GTA 6 developer's request to remove union's blacklisting claims from ongoing legal dispute
news.desc: An employment tribunal has ruled against Rockstar Games' request to remove blacklisting claims from the ongoing legal dispute over alleged union busting at the Grand Theft Auto 6 studio. Read more
news.descEN: An employment tribunal has ruled against Rockstar Games' request to remove blacklisting claims from the ongoing legal dispute over alleged union busting at the Grand Theft Auto 6 studio. Read more

news.title: SanDisk's officially licensed PlayStation 5 SSDs cost more than the console itself - even a PS5 Pro
news.titleEN: SanDisk's officially licensed PlayStation 5 SSDs cost more than the console itself - even a PS5 Pro
news.desc: SanDisk has today unveiled Optimus GX PRO 850P, a series of officially-licensed NVMe SSDs for PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro. The SSDs, which users can insert into their console to expand its storage, also work with PCs. Read more
news.descEN: SanDisk has today unveiled Optimus GX PRO 850P, a series of officially-licensed NVMe SSDs for PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro. The SSDs, which users can insert into their console to expand its storage, also work with PCs. Read more

news.title: Finally you can use all PlayStation DualSense controller features wirelessly on PC, but you will need to pay for it
news.titleEN: Finally you can use all PlayStation DualSense controller features wirelessly on PC, but you will need to pay for it
news.desc: Ray tracing and faster load-times be damned: the DualSense controller is the PS5's most impressive innovation. And while the controller does work on PC, Sony only supports its feature package when connected using a cable. Read more
news.descEN: Ray tracing and faster load-times be damned: the DualSense controller is the PS5's most impressive innovation. And while the controller does work on PC, Sony only supports its feature package when connected using a cable. Read more

news.title: Multiplayer servers for Battlefield Hardline close in under a week, but that's not necessarily the end for this zany off-shoot
news.titleEN: Multiplayer servers for Battlefield Hardline close in under a week, but that's not necessarily the end for this zany off-shoot
